title: SoulTale
description: A mod about souls from undertale
body:
### Starting a new world/server grands you a random soul and each soul has different effects

**Determination – Revive once upon death (15 min cooldown)**

**Justice – Getting hit marks the attacker. Hitting marked enemies deals 1.25x damage**

**Bravery – Deal 1.5x damage below half health, and 2x damage below 4 HP**

**Patience – Half the damage is delayed (delayed damage does not cause hitstun)**

**Integrity – Gain +2 armor below half health, +4 armor below 4 HP**

**Perseverance – Negative effects last half as long, positive effects last twice as long**

**Kindnes - Hitting a entity heals you half a heart**

**Hate – Below half health, attacks apply 3s Wither. Killing players grants Hate Stacks (+5% 
damage each, up to +50%). Stacks last 10 min and reset on death**

**Fear – Attacks apply 3s Slowness. If below half health, also apply Weakness**



I still think mod is missing something if you have ideas or suggestions i would love to hear them
